PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Android Developer with strong full-stack engineering experience and a solid foundation in building real-world, production-oriented applications. Proven ability to design and deliver scalable systems using React Native, Android, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, and Firebase. Experienced in AI-integrated platforms and interactive 3D workflows using Blender, Three.js, and Unreal Engine. Passionate about immersive technologies, clean architecture, and practical problem-solving.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Android Developer
Tickets99 | India
2024 – Present
• Developing and maintaining Android applications used in live event and ticketing workflows.
• Implementing REST API integrations, secure data handling, and optimized UI flows.
• Collaborating with backend teams to ensure stable real-time updates and reliable app behavior.
• Debugging production issues and improving overall performance and maintainability.
PERSONAL PROJECT
MediVoice – Medicine Reminder & Assistance Platform
Tech Stack: React Native, Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS S3, WebSockets, Firebase, Twilio, Google Gemini AI
• Designed a full-scale medicine management ecosystem with Patient, Seller, and Doctor mobile applications.
• Implemented medicine reminders using local alarms, voice alerts (TTS), and push notifications.
• Built missed-dose escalation logic with SMS and automated calls to guardians using Twilio.
• Integrated an AI chat assistant with persistent conversation history for user guidance.
• Implemented real-time synchronization using WebSockets.
• Set up CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, Docker, and AWS EC2 deployments.
• Focused heavily on elderly-friendly UX and real-world usability constraints.
B.TECH FINAL YEAR PROJECT
Deep Crack – Image-Based Crack Detection System
Tech Stack: Python, Flask, MobileNet, CNNs, SQLite, Data Augmentation
• Developed a deep learning-based system to detect surface cracks from uploaded images.
• Used transfer learning with MobileNet to improve detection accuracy and reduce training time.
• Applied data augmentation techniques to enhance model generalization.
• Evaluated model performance using confusion matrices and accuracy metrics.
• Built a Flask-based web application for real-time image upload and prediction visualization.
3D, INTERACTIVE & VISUAL DEVELOPMENT
• Created realistic and cinematic 3D scenes using Blender.
• Built interactive web-based visual experiences using Three.js with React.
• Experience with character animation pipelines (Mixamo, MetaHuman-ready assets).
• Strong interest in Unreal Engine workflows for games and immersive experiences.
